build.buildCommand: mkdir -p storage/framework/views storage/framework/sessions storage/framework/cache/data storage/logs && chmod -R 775 storage bootstrap/cache && php artisan config:clear && php artisan route:clear && php artisan view:clear && php artisan config:cache && php artisan route:cache && php artisan view:cache

deploy.startCommand: php artisan config:clear && php artisan route:clear && php artisan view:clear && php artisan migrate --force && php artisan config:cache && php artisan route:cache && php -S 0.0.0.0:$PORT -t public
